g.text: WAL Snapshot Isolation: Readers Never Block Writers (sqlite3.c)
Page 17 | Read from DB (not in WAL snapshot)
Rule 1 | FrameID <= Snapshot -> Reader sees frame
Rule 2 | FrameID > Snapshot -> Reader ignores frame
Rule 3 | Commit Marker -> Signals valid txn in WAL
Rule 4 | No Blocking -> Readers use SHM-lock for snapshots
Rollback Journal | Readers BLOCKED during write
WAL Mode | Readers CONCURRENT with writer
1. Reader captures mxWalFrame=100 from SHM file header
2. Writer appends frames 101-105 to WAL file and updates SHM
3. Reader searches SHM for pgno, ignoring any FrameID > 100
4. Result: Reader gets atomic, consistent view without locking writer
WAL contains frames in sequential order
